# Support

## Getting Help

- **Documentation**: Check the [README](https://github.com/danieljustus/symaira-seek#readme) for usage instructions and setup guides.
- **Bug Reports**: Open an issue using the [bug report template](https://github.com/danieljustus/symaira-seek/issues/new?template=bug-report.yml).
- **Feature Requests**: Open an issue using the [feature request template](https://github.com/danieljustus/symaira-seek/issues/new?template=feature-request.yml).

## Security

For security vulnerabilities, please see our [Security Policy](https://github.com/danieljustus/symaira-seek/security/policy). Do **not** open a public issue for security concerns.

## Community

- **Discussions**: Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/danieljustus/symaira-seek/discussions) for questions, ideas, and general conversation.

## What we don't offer

- Commercial support or consulting
- Guaranteed response times
- SLA-backed support
